name: German Meatballs#2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl combine the first 10 ingredients; shape into 18 meatballs, about 2 inches each.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet; brown the meatballs, turning them occasionally until they are evenly browned on all sides.
3. Remove the meatballs from the skillet and set aside to drain any excess fat.
4. Spoon the sauerkraut into the same skillet, spreading it out evenly.
5. Return the meatballs to the skillet, placing them on top of the sauerkraut.
6. Cover the skillet and simmer over low heat for 15-20 minutes, or until the meatballs are cooked through. If the sauce is too thick, add water gradually to achieve the desired consistency.
7. Sprinkle with parsley before serving. Yield: 6 servings.
